stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Reader reads RM sticks, compute tilizes then untilizes (identity passthrough), writer writes RM sticks back to DRAM

stages.name: reduce_mean
stages.description: Tilize input, compute row-wise mean via reduce SUM with 1/W scaler, broadcast mean to full row, untilize and output

stages.name: subtract_mean
stages.description: Tilize input, compute mean, subtract mean from each tile using COL broadcast, untilize centered values

stages.name: full_layer_norm
stages.description: Complete layer normalization: tilize, mean, center, variance, rsqrt, normalize, apply gamma and beta, untilize
stages.reference_body:
x = input_tensor.float()
    W = x.shape[-1]
    result = torch.nn.functional.layer_norm(x, [W], weight=gamma.squeeze().float(), bias=beta.squeeze().float(), eps=1e-5)
    return result.to(torch.bfloat16)
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
ttnn_gamma = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
    ttnn_beta = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
